_comment: Configuration for the DESIGN-gate (BACKLOG P1-5). Adjust globs/min for your stack.
_debugAudit_note: verify.js scans only changed diff files for leftover debug statements. Hard markers fail VERIFY; soft markers are notes when soft=true. exclude contains globs skipped by the audit.
_verify_note: Omit verify.stacks to enable auto-detect (python/dotnet/rust/node). Here we pin the harness's own self-test as the VERIFY step.
